name: Banchile Administradora General de Fondos SA - Banchile Fund Inversion Emerging Equity Fund
summary: Banchile Administradora General de Fondos SA - Banchile Fund Inversion Emerging Equity Fund is an emerging markets equity investment fund. It is managed by Banchile Administradora General de Fondos SA and focuses on generating returns through investments in stocks from emerging economies.
